abstract: Integrating the philosophy of Christian Religious Education (CRE) into theological curricula is far from a transgressive endeavor; rather, it is a vital practice that fosters personal growth and the edification of the faith community. Entrusting theology students with the rigors of CRE philosophy is essential, as the discipline cultivates discernment and harmonizes the intellectual, emotional, and spiritual faculties toward a pursuit of true wisdom. Because this philosophical inquiry is intrinsically linked to scriptural doctrine, the Holy Bible serves as the foundational authority and primary standard for all academic study in this field.
